title: Minibus-taxi task team committed to restoring peace
description: NATIONAL NEWS - The Mini-Bus Taxi Task Team...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"NATIONAL NEWS - The Mini-Bus Taxi Task Team (MBTTT) came together today, 12 June, in a special meeting amid conflict that flared up between operators in Somerset West and Mfuleni in the past weeks.","html":"NATIONAL NEWS - The Mini-Bus Taxi Task Team (MBTTT) came together today, 12 June, in a special meeting amid conflict that flared up between operators in Somerset West and Mfuleni in the past weeks."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"While the circumstances bringing the committee together are deeply troubling, the session proceeded with meaningful engagement as the situation was reviewed.","html":"While the circumstances bringing the committee together are deeply troubling, the session proceeded with meaningful engagement as the situation was reviewed."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Historical context, where things stand today, and potential scenarios for a mutually agreeable and positive way forward were discussed."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Resolving this complex matter is a process and stakeholder representatives have committed to continued discussions to find resolution as soon as possible over the next week.","html":"Resolving this complex matter is a process and stakeholder representatives have committed to continued discussions to find resolution as soon as possible over the next week."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The immediate priority is to see services and calm restored in the Somerset West and Mfuleni precincts, while solutions are sought.","html":"The immediate priority is to see services and calm restored in the Somerset West and Mfuleni precincts, while solutions are sought."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The MBTTT remains united in its commitment to the safety and mobility of commuters, and will be engaging consistently in the coming days to find common ground once more.","html":"The MBTTT remains united in its commitment to the safety and mobility of commuters, and will be engaging consistently in the coming days to find common ground once more."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The MBTTT comprises the representatives of the City of Cape Town, the Western Cape Government, and SANTACO Western Cape.","html":"The MBTTT comprises the representatives of the City of Cape Town, the Western Cape Government, and SANTACO Western Cape."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Minibus-taxi task team committed to restoring peace
